languages.text: {n}Эоганн восхищенно всплескивает руками.{/n} "Нунциус, засвидетельствуй акт сотворения примитивного техногенного идола! Прошу тебя, внимательно все фиксируй — это уникальная возможность пронаблюдать как культура, лишенная света Омниссии, пытается истолковать Его замысел!"

{n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн восхищенно всплескивает руками.{/n} "Нунциус, засвидетельствуй акт сотворения примитивного техногенного идола! Прошу тебя, внимательно все фиксируй — это уникальная возможность пронаблюдать как культура, лишенная света Омниссии, пытается истолковать Его замысел!"

Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

{n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

{n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

languages.text: {n}Eogunn alza las manos en el aire con alegría.{/n} «¡Nuncius, observe la creación de un ídolo tecnológico primitivo! Grabe todo en detalle: ¡es una oportunidad única de descubrir cómo una cultura carente de la luz del Omnissiah intenta interpretar Su diseño!».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn alza las manos en el aire con alegría.{/n} «¡Nuncius, observe la creación de un ídolo tecnológico primitivo! Grabe todo en detalle: ¡es una oportunidad única de descubrir cómo una cultura carente de la luz del Omnissiah intenta interpretar Su diseño!».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡兴奋地举起双手：{/n}“努恩修斯，快看，原始技术神像即将诞生！把这一切都仔细记录下来，这种机会可不常有。我们将亲眼见证，一个失去欧姆尼赛亚之光指引的文明，会如何解读祂的设计！”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡兴奋地举起双手：{/n}“努恩修斯，快看，原始技术神像即将诞生！把这一切都仔细记录下来，这种机会可不常有。我们将亲眼见证，一个失去欧姆尼赛亚之光指引的文明，会如何解读祂的设计！”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn lève les mains avec enthousiasme.{/n} « Nuncius, admire la création d'une idole technologique primitive ! Enregistre tout dans le plus grand détail, je te prie ; nous n'aurons pas d'autre chance d'observer comment une culture privée de la lumière de l'Omnimessie tente d'interpréter Son dessein ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn lève les mains avec enthousiasme.{/n} « Nuncius, admire la création d'une idole technologique primitive ! Enregistre tout dans le plus grand détail, je te prie ; nous n'aurons pas d'autre chance d'observer comment une culture privée de la lumière de l'Omnimessie tente d'interpréter Son dessein ! »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, neşeyle ellerini havaya kaldırıyor.{/n} "Nuncius, ilkel teknolojik bir put yaratma eylemine şahit ol! Lütfen her şeyi dikkatle kaydet. Hermesih'in ışığından mahrum kalmış bir kültürün O'nun tasarımını nasıl yorumlamaya çalıştığını gözlemlemek için eşsiz bir fırsat bu!"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn, neşeyle ellerini havaya kaldırıyor.{/n} "Nuncius, ilkel teknolojik bir put yaratma eylemine şahit ol! Lütfen her şeyi dikkatle kaydet. Hermesih'in ışığından mahrum kalmış bir kültürün O'nun tasarımını nasıl yorumlamaya çalıştığını gözlemlemek için eşsiz bir fırsat bu!"

languages.text: {n}エオガンは嬉々として両手を宙に振り上げた。{/n}「ヌンキウス、原始的な技術の偶像が創られる様を見届けてください！ すべてを注意深く記録するように――これは、オムニッシアの光を奪われた文化が、いかにして御方の設計を解釈しようと試みるかを観察する、またとない好機なのです！」
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"

traits.locale_text: {n}エオガンは嬉々として両手を宙に振り上げた。{/n}「ヌンキウス、原始的な技術の偶像が創られる様を見届けてください！ すべてを注意深く記録するように――これは、オムニッシアの光を奪われた文化が、いかにして御方の設計を解釈しようと試みるかを観察する、またとない好機なのです！」

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hebt fröhlich die Hände.{/n} "Nuncius, bezeugt die Schaffung eines primitiven technologischen Götzen! Bitte zeichnet alles sorgfältig auf ... das ist eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, zu beobachten, wie eine Kultur ohne das Licht des Omnissiah versucht, Seinen Plan zu deuten!"
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn gleefully throws his hands in the air.{/n} "Nuncius, witness the act of creating a primitive technological idol! Please record everything carefully — this is a unique opportunity to observe how a culture deprived of the Omnissiah's light attempts to interpret His design!"
